FORBIDDEN_WORDS = ["spam", "buy", "crypto", "click", "free", "viagra"]

def filter_messages(messages):
    clean = []
    for msg in messages:
        # Violation: performing an O(N) membership test against a list inside a loop is very slow
        if not any(word in FORBIDDEN_WORDS for word in msg.split()):
            clean.append(msg)
    return clean
